verses.text: Topa phat un. Topa' nasemte aw, phat un. Topa' min phat un
Topa' min in tu-a kipanin thupha ngah tawntung ta hen
Nisuahna pan nitumna dongin Topa' min phat ding ahi hi
Topa in minam khempeuh tungah uk a, ama minthan'na vantung sangin sangzaw hi
A sangna munah a tu, vantung leh leitung a hong ensuk Topa, eite' Pasian pen kua tawh kibang ahi hiam
Amah in leivui panin mizawngte laamto-in, ninphual panin mi cimawhte leh a lungkhamte domto a
uliante tawh kikhawl sakin ama mite' ulianin a bawl hi
Amah in tasel numei tungah ta guan' a, ta a nei nu a lungdamin a bawl hi. Topa phat un.
